theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A) → Topology.P3 (A) := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P3] at hP2 ⊢
  have h_mono : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    interior_mono (closure_mono (interior_subset (A := A)))
  exact hP2.trans h_mono

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  intro x hxA
  have hxInt : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hxCl : x ∈ closure (interior A) :=
    (interior_subset (s := closure (interior A))) hxInt
  exact hxCl
